name: Grand Ghirardelli Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the 6 dry ingredients and mix on low for 1 minute to combine.
3. Add the remaining ingredients all at once, mixing on medium for 1 minute and scraping down the sides of the bowl.
4. Mix on high for 3 minutes until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into two parchment-lined or greased and lightly floured 9-inch round cake pans.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set.
7. Allow the cakes to cool for 5 minutes before removing them from the pans and cooling on wire racks.
8. Once completely cooled, frost with Chocolate Butter Cream Frosting (separate recipe).
